title: Lorqual
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Lorqual''' were animals on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]], perhaps the world's biggest inhabitants. They were twice as tall and four times as massive as the [[suubatar]]s, and traveled in herds. They had bristly brown fur, blocky skulls with six bony knobs protuding from them, six feet with six horned toes, but only small eyes.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the diminutive but brave [[Gwurran]] [[Tooqui]] incited a lorqual stampede into a [[Qulun camp]], in order to rescue his [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] friends and their [[Alwari]]-outcast [[Kyakhta|guides]] from the machinations of the fat [[Merchant/Legends|trader]]-chief [[Baiuntu]], a pawn of [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin|Soergg]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and his [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] [[Ogomoor]]. The stampede accomplished its aim, and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] were able to successfully complete [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|their mission]] of uniting the Alwari tribes in an accord with the planetary government, the [[Unity of Community]], and thereby stave off [[Dooku/Legends|Sith]]- and [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]]-[[Shu Mai/Legends|led]] plots for Ansion to [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|secede]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
